title: Jcrespo
compiled_truth: Jcrespo is an external contact at [Hess](companies/hess). Over the corpus period (2000-12-12 to 2001-11-09), Jcrespo sent 4 and received 12 emails, totalling 16 interactions. Top correspondents: [Harlan Murphy](people/harlan-murphy) (4), [Trueheart' 'Cynthia](people/trueheart-cynthia) (3), [Delgado](people/delgado) (3), [Mdelgado](people/mdelgado-hess) (3), [John Crespo](people/john-crespo) (2).
